goal: Deliver the web-only local roundtable MVP with automatic real webpage execution for ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Doubao, shared discussion and relay context, local path storage, recovery controls, artifact audit, rollback, and a root BAT launcher.
non_goals: Do not build Electron, Tauri, an installer, or a native desktop application.
Do not rewrite the current control page in React during MVP.
Do not optimize roundtable node physics or visual styling before the real execution loop passes.
Do not require a database server or SQLite.
Do not promise support for providers other than ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Doubao in the MVP acceptance gate.
Do not modify or retire the legacy extension as part of this task.
acceptance_criteria: A command can insert and automatically submit a prompt into signed-in ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Doubao webpages and capture each new completed response.
Every browser prompt injects the old-plugin-compatible web_Agent JSONL protocol before the roundtable task and includes reverse-evidence rules plus the fixed fixed-io-encoding UTF-8 skill.
Prompt echoes and oversized history events are sanitized for subsequent turns while raw reply files remain unchanged for evidence.
Discussion mode gives all targets in one round the same immutable context snapshot and merges all completed replies into the next round.
Relay mode executes DeepSeek then Doubao then the snapped ChatGPT host, and ChatGPT produces the final host report.
The UI receives live state over SSE and exposes pause, resume, cancel, retry, skip, and manual reply takeover.
A configurable local data root stores atomic session state, append-only ledger JSONL, summaries, replies, plans, diagnostics, backups, audit, and indexes.
Storage root, import, reindex, session list/read/export, artifact write, and rollback APIs are tested.
Deterministic fake provider pages prove the entire browser worker and orchestrator loop without external accounts.
Real provider discussion and relay acceptance runs are recorded, or any external login/rate-limit blocker is evidenced with diagnostics rather than hidden.
The root start-web-agents.bat starts the verified local runtime and opens the control page only after health checks pass.
